statement: Phase Card as strategic visual container — The Phase Card is the highest-value visual container. Beyond holding actions/tasks, it should communicate where the work and focus of a phase concentrates, especially when collapsed, seeding future workload/communication-flow views without a full analytics engine. — Phase Card supports expanded/collapsed states, phase-level task/action density, readiness/blocker indicators, visual emphasis where most work exists, subtle background/light-intensity signals, and a seam for future heatmap and communication-flow indicators.
ux_impact: Collapsed phases still communicate weight and focus.
